race.comment: Tricky. ENZO CHARLEY (4) stepped out on his debut over 1206m at Terang, beaten 2.5 lengths. Had been well educated and can take this out with the extra fitness. KRASNOLUDEK (5) is fourth up and will find this more suitable than Geelong, where he didn't enjoy the best of luck. Improved at Ararat prior and can feature with average luck in the run. DOCTORATE (3) debuted at Geelong in the same contest and needed the run. Will have taken fitness and learning, and can improve in this company. ABBY'S CROSSWORD (7) has switched stables and been freshened 35 days. Drops back from a mile and shorter trips may be her go now. Has gone close on a few occasions and is likely to race well.
